parameters.query: SELECT id, name, category, brand, description, sku FROM products WHERE id = {{ $json.body.product_id }} LIMIT 1;
SELECT key, value FROM brand_guidelines ORDER BY key;

parameters.name: search_automotive_trends
parameters.description: Search Google for current automotive trends, TikTok content ideas, and social media buzz related to car mods and imports. Input should be a search query string.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO content_history (product_id, marketing_objective, tiktok_script, instagram_caption, visual_direction) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5) RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: { tiktok_script: $('Code: Parse Agent Output').item.json.tiktok_script, instagram_caption: $('Code: Parse Agent Output').item.json.instagram_caption, visual_direction: $('Code: Parse Agent Output').item.json.visual_direction, history_id: $json.id } }) }}
